economic_notes: ACDLP operates two convenience stores, a cafe, a tire shop and a canteen. Total ACDLP revenue was $8,922,986. Nation is a member of BATC Investments LP, BATC Land Holdings Ltd, FN Island Forest Management Inc, FN Cannabis LP.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). The nation has net debt of $1,979,706. A new asset retirement obligation of $2,348,641 was recognized in 2023 under PS 3280. Auditor's report includes an Emphasis of Matter regarding a claim against the Government of Canada for damages, funded by a loan with insurance coverage. In prior year (2022), a Treaty Land Entitlement Settlement of $43,275,501 was received and $42,145,804 was contributed to the TLE Trust - these are large one-time items in the prior year comparatives. The GBE (ACDLP) is accounted for using the modified equity method and not consolidated. Capital expenses of $3,576,454 and Justice expenses of $160,687 are reported as separate program segments. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $39,751,119 + CMHC $1,697,453 + Other Government Agencies $173,038 + Battle River Treaty 6 Health Centre $493,331 (treated as government transfer) = $43,114,941 approximately; osr computed as total revenue minus total_government_transfers.
warnings: High ISC dependency (80.64%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
